body:
Use this issue to track Sepo setup for this repository.

The latest setup status is maintained in the comment below.

comments.body:
<!-- sepo-agent-onboarding-check -->
## Sepo setup status

### Current status

- [x] GitHub App/auth: resolved via `github_token`
- [x] Model credentials: `OPENAI_API_KEY` configured
  - Agent provider: `codex` (AGENT_DEFAULT_PROVIDER)
- [x] Memory: initialized (`agent/memory`)
- [ ] Rubrics: not initialized
  - Optional: run **[Actions > Agent / Rubrics / Initialization](https://github.com/miluan1995/sepo-sandbox/actions/workflows/agent-rubrics-initialization.yml)**.

### Remaining setup

- [ ] Optional: run [Agent / Rubrics / Initialization](https://github.com/miluan1995/sepo-sandbox/actions/workflows/agent-rubrics-initialization.yml) to initialize rubrics branch `agent/rubrics`.

### Test Sepo

After setup, try:

```md
@sepo-agent /answer Is Sepo configured correctly in this repository?
```

Try implementation:

```md
@sepo-agent /implement Create a small README update that verifies the agent can open a PR.
```

On an open pull request:

```md
@sepo-agent /review
```

Last checked: [GitHub Actions run](https://github.com/miluan1995/sepo-sandbox/actions/runs/26267938144)

title: Sepo setup check
